name: fasthunter-downloader
description: A polished Windows download manager with segmented HTTP downloads and browser capture.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fasthunter/download-engine && npm run build --workspace @fasthunter/desktop && npm run build --workspace @fasthunter/browser-extension
scripts.package:windows: npm run icons && npm run build:native-host && npm run build --workspace @fasthunter/download-engine && npm run package:windows --workspace @fasthunter/desktop
